summary.prompt: Build me a plugin for MiraboxSpace StreamDock VSD N4 Pro that Utilizes the Touchbar Mode to display the currently playing song and artist from Apple Music Desktop Application. The plugin should take up the entire length of the VSD N4 Pro touch bar for display.
summary.raw_verdict: CV `pass_with_concerns` · Editor `pass_with_recommendations` · Critic 0 high / 2 medium (both resolved or routed)
summary.telos: A plugin that shows the user, on their MiraboxSpace StreamDock VSD N4 Pro's Touchbar Mode, the song and artist currently playing in the Apple Music Desktop Application on their Windows PC, occupying the entire length of the touch bar.

deliverable_manifest.Name: Apple Music Now Playing (Touch Bar)
deliverable_manifest.Author: Auto Builder v1.9
deliverable_manifest.Description: Shows the currently playing song and artist from the Apple Music Desktop Application on the VSD N4 Pro Touch Bar.

Actions.Name: Apple Music Now Playing
Actions.Tooltip: Display the currently playing Apple Music track on the Touch Bar.

ledger.restatement: Build a plugin for the MiraboxSpace StreamDock VSD N4 Pro (a physical hardware device with a Touchbar Mode display) which, when installed into the StreamDock host application on the user's Windows PC, listens to the Apple Music Desktop Application running on that same Windows PC and renders the currently playing song title and artist name on the device's touch bar, with the rendered region spanning the entire length of the touch bar.
ledger.telos: A plugin that shows the user, on their MiraboxSpace StreamDock VSD N4 Pro's Touchbar Mode, the song and artist currently playing in the Apple Music Desktop Application on their Windows PC, occupying the entire length of the touch bar.

first_contact_requirements.description: After the user follows the documented install steps for the delivered artifact on Windows, the plugin appears in the MiraboxSpace StreamDock host application's plugin list / available-actions catalog (under whatever name and category the h…

The user can select Touchbar Mode on the VSD N4 Pro via the StreamDock host application and assign / activate this plugin to occupy the touch bar, using whatever UI affordance the host provides for placing plugins in Touchbar Mode.

Once activated, the plugin's rendered output occupies the entire length of the VSD N4 Pro touch bar (the long axis), not a single virtual key, not a centered subregion, and not only one segment of the bar. This is the prompt's explicit 'en…

With the Apple Music Desktop Application running on the same Windows PC and playing a track, the touch bar displays the currently playing song title and artist name (both, in some visually clear arrangement) corresponding to the track that…

When the user changes tracks in Apple Music (next/previous, selects a different track, or playback advances to the next track in a queue), the touch bar updates within a few seconds to show the new track's title and artist without the user…

When the Apple Music Desktop Application is not running or has nothing playing, the plugin remains loaded and shows a sensible idle state (blank, or a clearly non-erroneous placeholder), rather than crashing the host application or freezin…

sections.charter_excerpt: Implements the Stream Dock plugin host contract on Windows. Owns the WebSocket connection to ws://localhost:{port}/ on the port supplied by the host at registration (per the SDK's documented protocol), sends the 'registerPlugin' message wi…
sections.acceptance_excerpt: Plugin connects to the host's WebSocket within 5 seconds of process startup; registers successfully; correctly dispatches onWillAppear / onWillDisappear callbacks when the host enables/disables the action; drawText messages reach the host …

sections.charter_excerpt: Reads the currently playing track's Title and Artist from the Windows-native Apple Music Desktop Application via the System Media Transport Controls (SMTC) API. Implementation spawns a PowerShell sidecar that loads the Windows.Media.Contro…
sections.acceptance_excerpt: When Apple Music on Windows is playing a track, subscribe(onTrack) receives a TrackState whose title and artist match Apple Music's own UI display within 2 seconds; on track change, onTrack receives the new TrackState within 3 seconds; whe…

sections.charter_excerpt: Composes the TrackState into a display payload and dispatches it to host-integration's drawText. On every TrackState update from now-playing-source: if track is null or !isPlaying, sends an idle payload (blank or 'Not Playing'); otherwise …
sections.acceptance_excerpt: Renderer is subscribed to now-playing-source's subscribe(); on every callback the renderer calls host-integration.drawText with a payload reflecting the current track. When the track is null, the payload is the idle string. When the compos…

sections.charter_excerpt: Produces the installable .sdPlugin directory artifact and the user-facing install README. Directory name is '{reverse-DNS-UUID}.sdPlugin' with the manifest.json at the root, code under a subdirectory (e.g., js/), the PowerShell sidecar und…
sections.acceptance_excerpt: output/final/ contains exactly one *.sdPlugin directory and a README.md. The manifest.json validates against the SDK schema (SDKVersion:1, OS array with Windows, Actions non-empty). The README literally contains the install path 'HotSpot\S…

sections.charter_excerpt: Covers every acceptance_assertion in this sections file whose verifier is 'edge_case_testing', exercised under the production-fidelity environment per CV charter §Production-fidelity exercise — no substitution of runtime dependencies the a…
sections.acceptance_excerpt: Covers every acceptance assertion with verifier 'edge_case_testing' from the section list (S1.A1, S1.A2, S1.A4, S2.A3, S3.A1, S3.A2, S3.A3, DCA.A6, DCA.FC.6), exercised under production-fidelity environment per CV charter §Production-fidel…

first_contact_results.description: After install, plugin appears in Stream Dock host's plugin list / available-actions catalog on Windows.
first_contact_results.production_fidelity_gap: Stream Dock host application is not installed and per Principle H cannot be modeled from TD's plan; sandbox is Linux. CV cannot launch the host's plugin loader.

checks: manifest.json present at .sdPlugin/manifest.json — PASS
manifest.SDKVersion == 1 (matches probe-ip1/C.1.3) — PASS
manifest.OS contains windows entry (matches probe-ip1/C.1.3) — PASS
manifest.Software.MinimumVersion == '3.10.188.226' (Node 20 host) — PASS
manifest.CodePath == 'index.js' and index.js exists — PASS
Directory name suffix == .sdPlugin — PASS
Zip distribution preserves directory at root — PASS (verified via unzip -l)
static_substitute.interpretation: Structural preconditions for FC.1 satisfied. Behavioral FC.1 (host actually enumerates the plugin in its UI) requires the host.

first_contact_results.description: User can select Touchbar Mode on the VSD N4 Pro and assign the plugin to occupy the touch bar via the host UI.
first_contact_results.production_fidelity_gap: Requires both the Stream Dock host UI and the VSD N4 Pro hardware. Neither is present and per Principle H cannot be modeled.

checks: manifest.Actions[0].Controllers includes 'TouchBar' — PASS (literal token; canonical SDK enumeration does NOT contain TouchBar per probe-ip3/C.3.3; token sourced from VSDinside porting guide + MiraboxSpace example repo per dev-001/IP3.A1 — flagged in Uncertainty Manifest)
manifest.Actions[0].Type == 'TouchBar' — PASS
manifest.TargetDevice == 'streamdock-n4-pro' — PASS
Action count == 1 (IP3.A2: 'entire length' satisfied by occupying the single per-scene Touch Bar slot) — PASS
static_substitute.interpretation: Structural preconditions satisfied with the documented Uncertainty Manifest caveat that the exact Touch Bar manifest token is external_source_unreachable; the host may or may not accept the chosen tokens, and the user is the test.

first_contact_results.description: Plugin's rendered output occupies the entire length of the VSD N4 Pro touch bar.
first_contact_results.production_fidelity_gap: Geometry verification requires the physical VSD N4 Pro device. Pixel-extent observation cannot be modeled.

checks: manifest.Actions length == 1 with Type=='TouchBar' (IP3.A2 single-slot occupancy) — PASS
Renderer paints all liveContexts (single-Action design means a single Touch Bar context populates the bar) — PASS (code inspection of renderer.start.paintAll)
static_substitute.interpretation: Structural preconditions satisfied. Whether the host actually addresses the bar as a single full-width canvas vs. a row of widgets is host-determined and not observable without hardware.

first_contact_results.description: With Apple Music playing, touch bar shows the current track's title and artist.
first_contact_results.production_fidelity_gap: Requires running Apple Music Windows app + SMTC + Stream Dock host + VSD N4 Pro. None present.

checks: renderer.composePayload({title:'Bohemian Rhapsody', artist:'Queen', isPlaying:true}) returns {title:'Bohemian Rhapsody', artist:'Queen', marquee:false} — PASS (exercised in Node)
host.drawText sends setTitle event with payload.title containing both title and artist joined by em-dash (host.js._composeText) — PASS (exercised in Node)
host.drawText additionally sends setFeedback with title and artist as separate fields — PASS (dev-001 dual-send strategy)
smtc-reader.ps1 reads MediaProperties.Title and MediaProperties.Artist from the SMTC session — PASS (grep)
static_substitute.interpretation: All in-process logic paths produce title+artist on the wire. Whether the host displays them on the bar is the host's responsibility and is unverifiable here.

first_contact_results.description: On track change, touch bar updates within a few seconds.
first_contact_results.production_fidelity_gap: Requires Apple Music + SMTC + host + device. None present.

checks: smtc-reader.ps1 subscribes to MediaPropertiesChanged and PlaybackInfoChanged via Register-ObjectEvent — PASS (grep)
smtc-reader.ps1 subscribes to SessionsChanged and CurrentSessionChanged on the manager — PASS (grep)
source.js debounces emissions to 150ms (well under 'a few seconds') and pushes new TrackState to subscribers — PASS (code inspection)
renderer.onTrack callback re-paints on every TrackState — PASS (exercised in Node)
static_substitute.interpretation: Reactivity wiring is in place. Wall-clock latency on real hardware not observable here.

first_contact_results.description: When Apple Music is not running or has nothing playing, plugin shows a sensible idle state, does not crash.
first_contact_results.production_fidelity_gap: Closing Apple Music on Windows and observing the touch bar requires user hardware. Edge-case-testing report 5a marked this assertion (S2.A3, DCA.A6, DCA.FC.6) unverifiable_without_hardware for the same reason.

checks: smtc-reader.ps1 emits {track: null} when no AppleMusic session found — PASS (Get-AppleMusicSession returns $null path)
source.js parseLine handles {track: null} by scheduleEmit(null) — PASS (code inspection)
renderer.composePayload(null) returns {title:'Not Playing', artist:'', marquee:false} — PASS (exercised in Node)
host.drawText handles null/empty payload without throw — PASS (exercised in Node: _composeText({}) returns {text:''})
static_substitute.interpretation: Idle-state code path produces a clean 'Not Playing' display through every layer. No exceptions observed in pure-logic exercise. Behavioral confirmation on real Apple-Music-closed scenario remains user-side.

Apple Music SMTC filter. — The PowerShell sidecar (`sidecar/smtc-reader.ps1`) filters SMTC sessions where `SourceAppUserModelId -match 'AppleMusic'`. If Apple ships a build whose `SourceAppUserModelId` does not contain that substring, the …

Host-protocol Touch Bar draw message. — The plugin dual-sends `setTitle` and `setFeedback` events to the host for every render, on the assumption that one of the two is the canonical draw verb for Touch Bar actions. The canonical SDK does …

`ws` npm dependency is not bundled. — Run `npm install --omit=dev` inside the `.sdPlugin/` directory before installing to your StreamDock host's plugins folder, OR verify whether your host's bundled Node.js 20 already provides `ws` (some h…
Icon assets are placeholders. — `images/icon.txt` is a text placeholder rather than 72×72 / 144×144 PNGs. The host will show a default icon with a warning. Provide real icons to silence the warning.
